items.title: One of Boston’s best sushi spots is expanding to the suburbs this fall
items.snippet: One of Boston’s best sushi spots will open its first suburban location later this year. Matsunori is expected to open at MarketStreet in Lynnfield this September, marking the famous brand’s expansion ...

items.title: MarketStreet Lynnfield To Add Renowned Japanese Handroll Restaurant From NYC
items.snippet: Kevin Liu's Matsunori concept is set to open its first North Shore location this fall.

items.title: Matsunori Handroll Bar Rolling Into MarketStreet Lynnfield
items.snippet: The popular hand roll spot is expanding with a new Lynnfield location.

items.title: Popular Boston handheld sushi restaurant expands to suburbs
items.snippet: [This story first appeared on Boston Restaurant Talk.] A restaurant in Boston that features a type of handheld sushi is going to be expanding to the suburbs. According to a poster within the Friends of Boston’s Hidden Restaurants Facebook group page, Matsunori Handroll Bar is planning to open at an as-of-yet undisclosed space in Lynnfield, with this being confirmed by the social media…

items.title: Authentic, affordable Japanese eatery with ‘homemade touch’ opens in Boston
items.snippet: Everything from the caviar-topped chicken nuggets to the Japanese Steak Frites is made with premium ingredients.

items.title: Kevin Liu loved eating at restaurants, so he figured: Why not open a few?
items.snippet: His newest spot, Mai, brings affordable Japanese food to the Seaport.
